prompt: Create a jungle using the tree in the image
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of a dense tropical jungle, featuring the tree from image 1 as a central, prominent element. The jungle should be lush with a rich variety of foliage, vines, and other trees, seamlessly integrating the distinctive shape and canopy of the tree from image 1 within the surrounding dense vegetation.
objects: tree from image 1 as a central, prominent element
